skill.name: elevenlabs-music
skill.description: Generate original music from text prompts using ElevenLabs AI via the inference.sh CLI. Create royalty-free tracks with customizable duration, genre, mood, and instruments for videos, podcasts, games, and more.
skill.summary: Create original AI-generated music from text prompts with ElevenLabs via inference.sh CLI.
skill.author: inferen-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 26 patterns but all are false positives. The SKILL.md file is documentation-only containing usage examples for the inference.sh CLI. External command detections are markdown code blocks showing legitimate CLI usage. Network URLs are documentation hyperlinks. No cryptographic code exists. The skill is restricted to 'Bash(infsh *)' limiting command execution scope. Low risk due to external CLI dependency requiring user authentication.

low_findings.title: External CLI Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill requires inference.sh CLI installation and user authentication. Commands are restricted to 'infsh *' pattern but still execute external binaries.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The skill depends on external CLI tool requiring installation and authentication. While restricted by allowed-tools pattern, it still executes external binaries.

content.user_title: Generate original music from text prompts with AI
content.value_statement: Creating background music and soundtracks traditionally requires musical expertise or expensive licensing. This skill uses ElevenLabs AI to generate royalty-free original music from simple text descriptions, enabling anyone to create custom audio for their projects.
actual_capabilities: Generate original music from text prompts up to 10 minutes duration
Support for 13+ genres including electronic, jazz, classical, orchestral, and lo-fi
Control over mood, tempo, instruments, and style parameters
Create royalty-free music for commercial and personal use
Generate short-form audio like jingles, notifications, and podcast intros
Integrate with voiceover workflows for complete audio production
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and user authentication
Prompt text limited to 2000 characters maximum
Duration constrained to 5-600 seconds (10 minutes maximum)
Music generation quality depends on prompt specificity and clarity

use_cases.title: Video content creators
use_cases.description: Generate custom background music and soundtracks for YouTube videos, social media content, and presentations without copyright concerns.

use_cases.title: Podcast production
use_cases.description: Create unique intro and outro jingles, segment transition music, and background beds tailored to podcast branding.

use_cases.title: Game developers
use_cases.description: Generate soundtracks for game levels, menu screens, battle sequences, and ambient exploration music with specific moods.

prompt_templates.title: Simple genre request
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a lo-fi hip hop beat for studying
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick background music for a study session video

prompt_templates.title: Detailed mood specification
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an uplifting corporate background track with clean piano, light percussion, and positive energy for a product demo video, 60 seconds duration

prompt_templates.title: Cinematic score creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Compose an epic orchestral trailer score with dramatic brass, fast strings, powerful percussion, building tension from calm to climactic, 45 seconds
prompt_templates.scenario: Movie trailer or dramatic video introduction

prompt_templates.title: Multi-step audio production
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate soft ambient background music for narration, non-intrusive, 60 seconds. Then combine with text-to-speech voiceover for a complete audio track.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complete voiceover with background music for tutorials

output_examples.input: Lo-fi hip hop beat, chill study music, vinyl crackle, mellow piano, 120 seconds
output_examples.output: Audio file URL: A 2-minute lo-fi track with characteristic vinyl warmth, laid-back hip hop drums, and gentle piano melody suitable for study or relaxation content.

output_examples.input: Epic cinematic orchestral score, dramatic build-up, brass and strings, trailer music, 45 seconds
output_examples.output: Audio file URL: A 45-second cinematic piece starting with subtle strings, building through brass swells, culminating in a powerful orchestral climax ideal for trailers or dramatic reveals.

best_practices: Include genre, mood, instruments, and duration in prompts for best results
Use descriptive adjectives like 'warm', 'energetic', 'minimal', or 'layered' to refine style
Start with shorter durations (15-30 seconds) to test prompt effectiveness before generating longer tracks
anti_patterns: Avoid overly complex prompts with contradictory instructions like 'calm energetic music'
Do not expect lyrics or vocals - the model generates instrumental music only
Avoid using copyrighted artist names or specific song references in prompts

faq.question: Is the generated music royalty-free for commercial use?
faq.answer: Yes, music generated through ElevenLabs via inference.sh is royalty-free and can be used in commercial projects including videos, podcasts, games, and advertisements.

faq.question: What is the maximum duration for generated music?
faq.answer: The maximum duration is 600 seconds (10 minutes). Minimum duration is 5 seconds. Common durations are 10-30 seconds for jingles and 60-120 seconds for background tracks.

faq.question: Can I generate music with vocals or lyrics?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates instrumental music only. For voiceover needs, use the elevenlabs-tts skill separately and combine with generated music.

faq.question: How do I install the required CLI tool?
faq.answer: Install the inference.sh CLI following the instructions at the official GitHub repository. You will need to create an account and authenticate using 'infsh login'.

faq.question: Can I combine generated music with other audio?
faq.answer: Yes, you can merge generated music with voiceovers using the infsh/media-merger skill, or combine with sound effects from the elevenlabs-sound-effects skill.

faq.question: What genres and styles are supported?
faq.answer: Supported genres include pop, rock, electronic, jazz, classical, hip-hop, lo-fi, ambient, orchestral, folk, R&B, metal, and country. You can also specify mood, tempo, instruments, and production style.
